markdownRemark.html:
About Me

I am a 1st year Ph.D. student in Ceder group at Department of Material Science and Engineering, UC Berkeley. I obtained my Bachelor’s degree in Chemistry at Hongyi Honor School, Wuhan University, China in 2017~2021.

Previously, I was a research intern in Ceder group at UC Berkeley on text-mining synthesis as well as on COVIDScholar website. After that, I interned at Machine Learning group, Microsoft Research Asia on AI for Sustainability.

Research Interest

My research interest mainly focuses on material informatics and automatic synthesis, that is, teaching computers and robots to think and behave like a scientist.

Feel free to contact me if you are interested in my research. 😉
